{{CargoClone
|name=Samurai Hattori
|rank=orange
|cabin=2
|id=115
|gene1={race} RUSH +50
|gene2={race} ART +50
|gene3=Each round, {race} RUSH +30
|gene4=Per 60 Mecha Minions in battle,
Troop Wind DMG +6
|gene5=Troop Wind DMG +0.9%
|gene6=Per 60 Mecha Minions in battle,
Troop Wind DMG +10
|gene7=Troop Wind DMG +1.5%
|}}
